title: cardamine acris subsp. acris
intro: Cardamine acris subsp. acris, also known as the winter cress, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae that grows in mountainous and alpine regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cardamine acris subsp. acris include its ability to reduce inflammation and combat infections, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and sore throats. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
